services.title: New Water & Sanitary Connection (Aadhaar eKYC)
services.description: Apply for new domestic or commercial drinking water and sewerage connection using Aadhaar eKYC. No physical office visit required for initial application.

steps.title: Aadhaar eKYC Registration
steps.details: Visit cms.bwssb.gov.in and verify applicant identity via Aadhaar OTP.

steps.title: Upload Property Documents
steps.details: Upload BBMP Khata certificate, Sanctioned Building Plan, and Property Tax receipt.

steps.title: Site Inspection by Assistant Engineer (AE)
steps.details: BWSSB AE conducts feasibility study for water main pipeline tapping point.

steps.title: Pay Pro-Rata & Connection Charges
steps.details: Pay pro-rata infrastructure fee and meter installation charges online.

steps.title: Pipeline Tapping & Meter Fitting
steps.details: Licensed plumber connects main pipe and seals official water meter.

fees.amount: Based on total built-up floor area (sq.m)

services.title: BWSSB Connection Name Transfer
services.description: Change the name on your BWSSB water bill to reflect new property ownership after purchase or inheritance.

steps.title: Lodge Transfer Request on CMS
steps.details: Log in to cms.bwssb.gov.in with existing RR Number (Water Account No).

steps.title: Upload Sale Deed & Tax Receipt
steps.details: Attach registered Sale Deed, BBMP Khata, and ID proof.

steps.title: Verification & Fee Payment
steps.details: Pay transfer fee of ₹200 online upon AE clearance.

documents.name: BBMP Khata Certificate in New Owner Name

services.title: Water Meter Testing & Fault Replacement
services.description: Request replacement for stolen, broken, or inaccurate water meter.

steps.title: Report Damaged / Faulty Meter
steps.details: File request on cms.bwssb.gov.in or call 1916.

steps.title: Purchase AMR/Class-B Meter or Request BWSSB Meter
Sealing & Calibration
steps.details: BWSSB meter inspector tests calibration and seals meter.

documents.name: Police FIR (if meter stolen)
documents.note: Only required for stolen meter claims
